So there is a good amount of visibility we're having in Google's AI overviews generally.

And then we're kind of coming to the point as well in the program where we need to.
Sort of start looking beyond clicks.
So a few metrics that generally we look at is this one, which I included in the local report on the third page.
It's generally breaking down the proportion of branded versus non-branded impressions, which is how often are we showing up?

Like how often are we showing up in results where people are Googling prophecy or spelling mistakes of prophecy or whatever directly in their search browsers versus something else like, say, ETL or ELT or something of that sort.
Generally, what happens is that when the program starts off, you see a huge reliance on branded search because that's how companies get found.
And non-branded sort of impressions and search opportunities are pretty low.
Generally, as the program matures and if SEO is working well, we want to see the proportion of branded versus non-branded impressions come to a 60-40.
Sort of a split.
So we're headed in the right direction.
In February, which is when we kind of started because we started publishing towards the end of Jan, it started off at like 75, 25, branded to non-branded.
And right now, as this second table here shows, we're at 69 to 31.
So we're headed in the right direction.
And then given the way this month has gone so far, I'm pretty positive like we're going to be headed towards, you know, that ideal ratio of around 60, 40.

The reason that matters is because the more people find us through non-branded search terms, we expect people to know more of our prophecy and then return to the website just by directly searching prophecy or putting in search phrases that, you know, are related to the content that we're producing instead of searching on Google and then navigating their way forward.
So that is one metric.
The way to measure return visitors, the people who are are.
You know, who visited our page once and then they're returning by typing prophecy or some brand term directly in the browser is this metric, which is return direct visitors.
Our setup is exploration in GA4.
It's a pretty simple one.
Generally, this chart is always a bit choppy.

One indicator to see whether, you know, SEO is impacting branded search or not is to look at the averages.
So what was the average return direct visitors before?
And where is that trending now?
So for us, it's still we're at the point where we should start to see some impact.
And, you know, generally the averages are higher, like the right hand side of this chart.
After we started the SEO program, it seems like the average is higher.
And I think given the way we're performing, we should see this increase.
And this is just something that we want to track over the long term and just see that, okay, the number of returns.
The requisitors is increasing.
The third one is kind of a minor data point, but it just captures in-session conversions.
What that means is the number of people who visited Prophecy's website consumed content and directly downloaded an e-book of some sort and give you their information.

So it just kind of lets us know that, okay, content generally we are converting some people to, you know, I don't know if you call that a lead, but at least they're giving us an email.
So far, we've had like eight e-book downloads.
It doesn't sound like a lot, but you have to consider that this is in-session.
So somebody visits once and immediately downloads it.
Usually what happens is people visit two or three times, consume more content, and then download stuff.
So this is kind of the TLDR I wanted to give you.
I know it's a lot of information.

Generally, yes.
We do want to see taller bars throughout because that means...

at downloads on first session.

How reviews?

to hear what you think about the sort of e-book, the feedback, et cetera, on that.

just shows like, okay, you know, it's not like only one article is good and the other are kind of rubbish.

launch at the end of that month, and so I'm wondering if those two things increased the number of searches directly for Prophecy and just bringing people to our site, and maybe that was like the blip, and then what we're seeing later is like the steady state potentially, but I don't know, I guess just a question.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and new metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance showing positive trends: increased impressions, clicks, and visibility in AI overviews](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [New metrics introduced: branded vs non-branded search, return direct visitors, and in-session conversions](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [E-book content received positive initial feedback, leveraging Prophecy's existing resources effectively](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [Team exploring ways to better understand and optimize for AI-driven search results (Google, GPT, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Significant spike in clicks and impressions last week](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [18 articles spotlighted in LLMs, showing up for 109 keywords with 46,000 total search volume](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Branded vs non-branded impressions improving from 75/25 in February to 69/31 currently, trending towards ideal 60/40 ratio](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Return direct visitors showing higher averages post-SEO program initiation](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [8 in-session e-book downloads from GrowthX content, considered promising for early-stage performance](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)

### AI Overview Optimization

  - [Prophecy content performing well in Google AI overviews](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Different strategies for optimizing across platforms:](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
      - [GPT: Values brand strength](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [Perplexity: Prioritizes SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
